entities.name: MG-2
entities.context: Second pass of meeting intelligence processing pipeline that generates intelligence blocks from canonical transcripts

entities.name: B01_DETAILED_RECAP
entities.context: Intelligence block type: detailed recap of meeting content

entities.name: B03_STAKEHOLDER_INTELLIGENCE
entities.context: Intelligence block type: stakeholder analysis and intelligence

entities.name: B03_DECISIONS
entities.context: Intelligence block type: decisions captured during meeting

entities.name: B05_ACTION_ITEMS
entities.context: Intelligence block type: action items extracted from meeting

entities.name: B06_BUSINESS_CONTEXT
entities.context: Intelligence block type: business context surrounding the meeting

entities.name: B07_TONE_AND_CONTEXT
entities.context: Intelligence block type: tone analysis and contextual notes

entities.name: B14_BLURBS_REQUESTED
entities.context: Intelligence block type: blurbs or short-form content requested during meeting

entities.name: B21_KEY_MOMENTS
entities.context: Intelligence block type: key moments identified in meeting

entities.name: B25_DELIVERABLES
entities.context: Intelligence block type: deliverables identified from meeting

entities.name: B26_MEETING_METADATA
entities.context: Intelligence block type: metadata about the meeting itself

entities.name: manifest.json
entities.context: Meeting manifest file tracking processing state, block generation status, and pipeline progress

entities.name: MG-2_Prompt
entities.context: The prompt/agent that executes the MG-2 processing pass and updates the manifest

relationships.context: MG-2 generates the detailed recap intelligence block
MG-2 generates tone and context block
MG-2_Prompt updates manifest.json with processing state after completing its pass
MG-2 pass triggers updates to manifest tracking fields including blocks_generated and last_updated_by
